mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contract_purchases WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_purchases (project_id, purchase_type, project_name, subcontract_name, vendor_name, contract_date, contract_start, contract_end, supply_amount, vat_amount, total_amount, memo) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{purchaseType}, #{projectName}, #{subcontractName}, #{vendorName}, #{contractDate}, #{contractStart}, #{contractEnd}, #{supplyAmount}, #{vatAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_purchases SET purchase_type = #{purchaseType}, project_name = #{projectName}, subcontract_name = #{subcontractName}, vendor_name = #{vendorName}, contract_date = #{contractDate}, contract_start = #{contractStart}, contract_end = #{contractEnd}, supply_amount = #{supplyAmount}, vat_amount = #{vatAmount}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM contract_purchases WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
